info.title: Chorala API
info.description: Open-core product-feedback platform. Public/widget API (X-Chorala-Key), admin API (hk_ key or session), end-user SSO, webhooks. Full prose reference: /docs and docs/API.md.

post.summary: Upload a screenshot (link via createPost attachmentIds)

get.summary: The active survey to show this visitor (segment-aware), or null

post.summary: Segment-compatible inbound webhook (identify/group → end-users + companies). Bearer = the project inbound secret.

get.summary: List posts (filters: board/status/appVersion/company/plan/minMrr/assignee; sort incl. revenue, score; ?format=csv exports)
The post author’s end-user + company (revenue context)

post.summary: Vote on behalf of a customer (by email / externalId)

get.summary: List companies + rollups (users, posts), richest first

patch.summary: Edit a company (mrr / plan / name / domain)

post.summary: Create a score field { key, label, weight }

get.summary: List segments + how many end-users match each

post.summary: Live match count for an unsaved definition
Create an API key (raw key shown once)
Autopilot: ingest a support conversation → AI extracts pending posts
Ask a natural-language question over your feedback
Approve a pending AI-ingested post (→ live)
